pi_items.verified_value: Refuse Truck (user-provided string, not a fixed value)
pi_items.source: task.json line 17 - this is the target configuration name to be created. Task description indicates agent should 'Create a profile named Refuse Truck'

Sygic GPS Navigation documentation confirms vehicle types include Truck, Car, Caravan, Van, Bus. Export script (line 34) queries 'type' from vehicle database. Verifier (line 72) checks for uppercase 'TRUCK'
Sygic GPS Navigation supports fuel types: Petrol, Diesel, LPG, CNG (per web search). Export script (line 34) queries 'fuelType' field. Verifier (line 86) checks for uppercase 'DIESEL'
Sygic GPS Navigation vehicle profile supports production year field per documentation. Export script (line 34) queries 'productionYear'. Verifier (line 93) checks for '2018'

Sygic supports emission standards Euro 1-6. Web search confirms EURO6 is supported for vehicle configuration. Export script (line 34) queries 'emissionCategory'. Verifier (line 100) checks for 'EURO6' or 'EURO_6'

Setup script (line 40) confirms: 'Route compute = Fastest (1) -- must change to Shortest (0)'. Verifier (line 129) checks that route_compute == '0'. Sygic documentation confirms three route options: Fastest, Shortest, Economic

Setup script (line 43) shows preference 'tmp_preferenceKey_routePlanning_motorways_avoid' with initial value 'false' that must be changed to 'true'. Sygic documentation confirms 'Avoid Highways' as route customization option. Verifier (line 140) checks highways == 'true'
Setup script (line 46) states: 'App theme = Auto (0) -- must change to Night (2)'. Verifier (line 151) checks theme == '2'. Sygic documentation confirms night mode/theme is supported

Setup script (line 49) shows preference 'preferenceKey_weather_temperatureUnits' initialized to 'Metric' and must change to 'Imperial'. Sygic documentation and web search confirm support for Celsius/Fahrenheit (Metric/Imperial) temperature units. Verifier (line 162) checks for 'imperial' or 'fahrenheit' in lowercase

privileged_info_summary: The overnight_refuse_collection task configures the Sygic GPS Navigation app (com.sygic.aura) with a vehicle profile for a municipal refuse truck operating overnight. The metadata specifies valid configuration targets: vehicle type TRUCK with diesel fuel, 2018 production year, and Euro 6 emissions standard. App settings must be configured for shortest route planning, highway avoidance, night theme display, and Fahrenheit temperature units. All metadata values correspond to actual features and valid enum values in the Sygic GPS Navigation application.
